creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
This feature is described here: https://git-scm.com/docs/git-instaweb

How to repeat:
1. Have git and lighttpd installed
2. clone some repo
3. cd into that directory
4. run 'git instaweb'
5. Browser opens at http://127.0.0.1:1234/ showing 404 - Not Found

git-2.15.1
lighttpd-1.4.48_1
